original_text: On the balance sheet, Apple's current ratio stands at 0.8794 (calc_id_d2a9afd8-34c1-481f-bcd8-08ac6e7ec4d7), indicating that the company has a relatively low level of liquidity. Additionally, Apple's leverage remains high, with a debt-to-equity ratio of 2.61 (calc_id_e59ce546-00b9-4b62-a1cd-6f4e46a1851d) and net debt of $108,834 million (calc_id_85c5c25f-55c1-42ad-a381-fb98ff54ca9e).
